data.title: TLS/SSL Encryption
data.description: Netflix encrypts data in transit using industry-standard encryption protocols to protect sensitive information.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Implements DDoS mitigation techniques to protect against distributed denial of service attacks.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield Advanced and custom-built defense mechanisms.

data.title: User Authentication and Access Control
data.description: Robust user authentication mechanisms to ensure secure access to accounts.

data.title: Security Monitoring and Incident Response
data.description: Continuous monitoring for security threats with a dedicated incident response team.
data.technical_spec: SIEM tools and real-time anomaly detection.

data.title: Data Privacy and Compliance
data.description: Adheres to global data privacy standards such as GDPR.
data.technical_spec: Data anonymization and transparency in data usage.
